Templates › Subcontractor Agreement

🤝 Subcontractor Agreement

Simple subcontractor agreement template for NZ tradies — covers scope, payment terms, liability, and insurance requirements.

How to use: Get this signed before any subcontractor starts work. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo
SUBCONTRACTOR AGREEMENT
Date: 2026-01-01
Principal Contractor
Your Business Name
Address / Phone
Subcontractor
Subcontractor Business Name
Address / Phone / GST No
1. Scope of Work
Describe the work the subcontractor will perform, including location and timeframe...
2. Payment
Rate: $[amount] per [hour/day/lump sum]. Invoicing: [weekly / on completion]. Payment within [14] days of invoice.
3. GST
Subcontractor is / is not GST registered. GST No: [if applicable]
4. Insurance
Subcontractor holds: Public liability insurance (min $1M). Proof to be provided before commencing work.
5. Health & Safety
Subcontractor agrees to comply with the HSWA 2015 and the Principal's site safety requirements at all times.
6. Liability
Subcontractor is responsible for defects arising from their own work and must rectify at their own cost within [14] days of notification.
7. Independent Contractor
This agreement does not create an employment relationship. The subcontractor is an independent contractor responsible for their own tax obligations.
Principal Contractor / Date
Subcontractor / Date
This is a simple template only — not legal advice. For large contracts, seek legal review. TradieTools NZ — tradietools.nz

🤝 Subcontractor Agreement

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Get this signed before any subcontractor starts work.

  • 🎯 Project Handover Checklist
  • 📦 Purchase Order
  • 👷 Employee Induction Checklist
  • 🚨 Incident & Near Miss Report
  • 🗓️ Maintenance Schedule
  • 📋 Contractor / Visitor Site Induction
  • 📜 Terms of Trade / Customer Agreement
  • ⚖️ CCA Payment Claim
  • 🏗️ Site-Specific Safety Plan (SSSP)
  • 🔎 Job Safety Analysis (JSA)
  • ⏱️ Weekly Timesheet
  • 💌 Overdue Invoice / Payment Reminder
